Description: Complete process for registering new customers including identity verification and account setup
Systems Involved: CRM System, Identity Verification API, Account Management System
Data Sources: Customer Application Form, Identity Documents, Credit Bureau Data
Data Outputs: Customer Account, Welcome Package, Access Credentials
Integration Points: Payment Gateway, Risk Management System, Notification Service
Stakeholders: Customer Service Reps, Compliance Officer, Risk Analyst
Business Rules: Customer must pass identity verification, Credit score > 600, Age > 18
Exception Handling: Manual review for failed automation, Escalation to supervisor for edge cases
Compliance Requirements: KYC/AML compliance, Data privacy regulations, Customer identification program
Dependencies: Identity Verification API, Credit Bureau Connection
Key Performance Indicators: Processing Time, Success Rate, Customer Satisfaction
Pain Points: Manual document review, System integration delays
Quality Gates: Identity verification, Credit check, Compliance review
Approval Levels: Supervisor for high-risk, Manager for exceptions

Description: Real-time authorization of card-based payments including fraud screening and fund verification
Systems Involved: Payment Processor, Fraud Detection System, Card Networks
Data Sources: Payment Request, Card Data, Merchant Info
Data Outputs: Authorization Response, Transaction Log, Fraud Score
Integration Points: Card Networks (Visa/MC), Bank APIs, Risk Engine
Stakeholders: Payment Engineers, Risk Team, Network Operations
Business Rules: Valid card number, Sufficient funds, Pass fraud checks
Exception Handling: Decline with reason code, Retry logic for network issues, Manual review for suspicious patterns
Compliance Requirements: PCI DSS compliance, Network rules, Regional regulations
Dependencies: Card Network Connectivity, Fraud Detection System
Key Performance Indicators: Authorization Rate, Response Time, Fraud Detection Rate
Quality Gates: Fraud check, Risk score validation, Network compliance

Description: Daily matching of processed transactions with network settlements and fee calculations
Systems Involved: Settlement System, General Ledger, Reporting Platform
Data Sources: Transaction Data, Network Files, Bank Statements
Data Outputs: Reconciliation Report, Exception List, Financial Postings
Integration Points: Banking Systems, Network Settlement Files, ERP System
Stakeholders: Finance Analysts, Treasury Team, Operations Manager
Business Rules: All transactions must match, Variances < $100 auto-approved, Daily closure required
Exception Handling: Exception investigation, Manual adjustment for variances, Escalation for material differences
Compliance Requirements: SOX compliance, Audit requirements, Financial reporting standards
Key Performance Indicators: Match Rate, Exception Count, Closure Time
Pain Points: Manual investigation of exceptions, Late settlement files
Quality Gates: Three-way matching, Variance analysis, Management review

Description: Complete processing of international wire transfers including FX conversion and regulatory compliance
Systems Involved: SWIFT Network, FX Engine, Compliance Platform
Data Sources: Payment Instruction, Beneficiary Info, FX Rates
Data Outputs: SWIFT Message, Transaction Confirmation, Regulatory Filing
Integration Points: SWIFT Network, Correspondent Banks, Regulatory Systems
Business Rules: Valid beneficiary, Sanctions screening passed, Sufficient liquidity, Regulatory compliance
Exception Handling: Hold for manual review, Additional documentation request, Correspondent bank issues
Compliance Requirements: OFAC compliance, AML requirements, Local regulations, BSA reporting
Key Performance Indicators: Success Rate, Processing Time, Regulatory Compliance Rate
Pain Points: Complex correspondent chains, Manual compliance reviews
Seasonal Variation: Increased during business hours in target regions
Quality Gates: Sanctions screening, Beneficiary verification, Regulatory check
Approval Levels: Compliance Officer for holds, Manager for large amounts
